hero.sub: From websites that convert to campaigns that scale — we help Macedonian businesses claim their space on the internet.

services.desc: Every business deserves a strong digital presence. We deliver end-to-end solutions — from your first website to full-scale digital marketing campaigns.

items.name: Web Design & Dev
items.desc: Fast, mobile-first websites that look great and convert visitors into customers. We build on modern stacks with SEO baked in.

items.name: SEO & Content
items.desc: Rank higher on Google for searches your customers are making. Local SEO strategies tailored for the Macedonian market.

items.name: Social Media
items.desc: Strategic content and management for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok. We build audiences that become loyal customers.

items.name: Paid Advertising
items.desc: Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns that deliver measurable ROI. We manage budget, targeting, and creative — you get results.

process.desc: Simple, transparent, and collaborative. We keep you in the loop at every step.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.text: We learn about your business, goals, and target customers. Free consultation — no pressure, no jargon.

steps.title: Strategy & Proposal
steps.text: We send you a clear plan with timeline, deliverables, and pricing. No hidden costs, ever.

steps.title: Design & Build
steps.text: Our team gets to work. You receive regular updates and have input throughout the process.

steps.title: Launch & Grow
steps.text: We go live and monitor performance. Then we help you scale with ongoing marketing support.

pricing.desc: Straightforward packages designed for Macedonian businesses at every stage. Get in touch for a quote tailored to your business.

contact.successText: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errorText: Please try again or email us directly.

placeholders.name: Aleksandar Petrovski
placeholders.message: What do you sell, who are your customers, what's your goal...
